title: TemporalSnapshot
description: Schema for Semantica temporal version manager snapshots (format_version 1.0).

format_version.description: Schema version. Must be '1.0' for snapshots conforming to this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime at which the snapshot was created.

author.description: Email address or identifier of the person who created the snapshot.

entities.description: List of entity dictionaries captured in this snapshot.

relationships.description: List of relationship dictionaries captured in this snapshot.

checksum.description: SHA-256 hex digest over the snapshot content (excluding the checksum field itself).

metadata.description: Optional free-form metadata dictionary (e.g. tags, revision_event).
